keyset.title: Keyset
keyset.profile.name: Profile Name
keyset.status.profile_created: Created a new profile from current bindings.
keyset.status.profile_captured: Captured the current live bindings into the selected profile.
keyset.status.exported: Copied the selected profile JSON to the clipboard.
keyset.status.resolve_preview: Generated an auto-resolve preview for the active profile.
keyset.status.resolve_none: No safe auto-resolve changes were found.
keyset.status.resolve_applied: Applied the auto-resolve preview to the active profile.
keyset.status.binding_cleared: Cleared the selected binding and saved it to the active profile.
keyset.error.import_empty: Clipboard JSON did not contain any profiles.
keyset.error.no_preview: Generate an auto-resolve preview before applying it.
keyset.error.no_undo: There is no auto-resolve change to undo.
keyset.error.actions_require_active: Quick binding actions only work on the active profile.
keyset.keybinds.jump_helper: Vanilla keybind editor opened for the selected conflict.
keyset.keybinds.reassign_helper: Press a new key now to reassign the selected conflict.
